# Compliance for UK Care Homes — MEOK AI Labs | CQC + 14 LA + EU AI Act

> UK care home AI compliance. CQC Safe key question + 14 local authority commissioner visibility + EU AI Act Article 50. Falls detection, medication reminders, scheduling AI. £4,950 audit, sovereign UK.

## Overview
Compliance for UK Care Homes — MEOK AI Labs | CQC + 14 LA + EU AI Act is part of the MEOK AI Labs sovereign compliance and attestation platform.
